mano_cua.result_summary: WebContainer内嵌服务器无法启动（缺少common.zip文件导致Vite构建失败），预览面板持续显示Yikes错误，无法测试重定向功能。已尝试启用cookies、多次刷新、等待60秒以上均无效。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The tutorial embedded server (WebContainer) fails to start due to a missing common.zip file referenced in src/lib/client/adapters/common/index.js. This causes the webcontainer/index.js module to fail to load. The preview panel persistently shows Yikes error. Redirect functionality could not be tested.
